title: deck.json
description: Manifest at the root of a .deck package (a Zip containing this file plus the self-contained index.html). Only `entry` is strictly required; everything else has sensible defaults.

id.description: Package identifier; also used as the .deck filename.

entry.description: Relative path to the deck's entry HTML inside the package.

orientation.description: Intended presentation orientation. 1920x1080 decks are landscape.
